author: Wanda T.
text: Great people!! Polite, kind, efficient and reasonable. Highly recommend for all dental needs.

author: Angela
text: From the receptionist to the hygienist to the dentist, everyone greeted me with a big smile and made me feel welcome. Scheduling was easy and they even kindly accommodated a reschedule.

author: Larry B.
text: I've been to this dentist three times in six months for different services. Cleaning, a filling, and a crown. Excellent care and value each time. Extremely impressed with this practice.

author: Shaina F.
text: Office is always clean! The doctors and the assistants are all wonderful! The new Orthodontist is wonderful and truly cares!! Front office staff are wonderful as well.

author: Daniel S.
text: Amazing experience with my wisdom teeth removal. My bottoms were impacted and the operation went great.

author: Sai Sanjana M.
text: Great experience! I had fillings, a tooth extraction, and a root canal done here. The dentist was very professional, gentle, and explained everything clearly.

author: Julie B.
text: Staff is very friendly and welcoming. Fast and Efficient. Doctor is very thorough and gives excellent care! Highly recommend.

author: Ricky D.
text: Doctor Mundlura is an amazing dentist. Very friendly and professional. Short waiting time. Staff is very friendly and professional.

author: Samuel
text: Great service, very professional and caring. One of the best wisdom tooth removals I've ever had done. Thank y'all very much.

author: Daislyn C.
text: I brought my kids and husband in for dental cleanings, and the doctor was amazing! We truly enjoy coming here. Every visit, my kids are happy and excited to see their dentist.

author: A.J.
text: Dr. Chapala is really a great dentist! I am always satisfied when I need to go get an extraction from him. He is great at what he does. Quick and gentle.

author: Sharon C.
text: Today I had a cleaning and X-rays done. Nelly took care of me. She did amazing. It was really fast and she was really gentle. The doctor was amazing!
